title: calophyllum wallichianum var. tahanense
intro: Calophyllum wallichianum var. tahanense, also known as the Tahan Calophyllum or Tahan Tree, is a plant species belonging to the Calophyllum genus. It is a tropical tree native to Malaysia, and its bark, leaves, and seeds are traditionally used in folk medicine for their medicinal properties. The plant has been found to exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to treat various health conditions, including wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be applied topically to harness its medicinal benefits.
